info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure SQL Database replication links
info.description: Provides read, delete, and failover functionality for Azure SQL Database replication links.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Replicationlinks Linkid Failover

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database that has the replication link to be failed over.
(Required) The ID of the replication link to be failed over.

request.description: Sets which replica database is primary by failing over from the current primary replica database.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Replicationlinks Linkid Forcefailoverallowdataloss

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database that has the replication link to be failed over.
(Required) The ID of the replication link to be failed over.

request.description: Sets which replica database is primary by failing over from the current primary replica database. This operation might result in data loss.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Replicationlinks Linkid Unlink

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database that has the replication link to be failed over.
(Required) The ID of the replication link to be failed over.

request.description: Deletes a database replication link in forced or friendly way.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Replicationlinks Linkid

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database that has the replication link to be dropped.
(Required) The ID of the replication link to be deleted.

request.description: Deletes a database replication link. Cannot be done during failover.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Replicationlinks Linkid

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database to get the link for.
(Required) The replication link ID to be retrieved.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Sql Servers Servername Databases Databasename Replicationlinks

variable.description: (Required) The name of the database to retrieve links for.
